zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Katherine Holt於1354年出生在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓時，她的父親John Holt30歲，母親Alianore Durvassal29歲。她和Sir Guy de la Spine至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1438年6月30日在她的家鄉享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Katherine Holt于1354年出生在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓时，她的父亲John Holt30岁，母亲Alianore Durvassal29岁。她和Sir Guy de la Spine至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1438年6月30日在她的家乡享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: Holt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, North German, Dutch, Danish, and Norwegian: topographic name for someone who lived in or by a small wood, from Middle English, Middle Low German, Danish, and Norwegian holt, or a habitational name from one of the many places called with this word. In England, the surname is widely distributed, but more common in Lancashire and Yorkshire than elsewhere.

variants.name: Hohlt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Ordell.
North German: variant of Holt with the additional h reflecting the lengthened vowel or a variant of Hohl with the addition of excrescent -t.
Scandinavian: variant of   Holt  .

variants.name: Holten
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Hjalmer, Lars, Nils.

Dutch (also Van Holten) and North German: habitational name from any of the places so called, from Low German holt ‘holt, copse, small wood’. There are two in the Dutch province of Overijssel and another near Oberhausen in the Rhineland.
Danish: variant of   Holt  .

variants.name: Holtan
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads so named, from the definite plural form of holt ‘small wood’ (see Holt ).

variants.name: Holter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Selmer, Hilmar, Knute, Lars.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads in southeastern Norway, from the indefinite plural of holt ‘holt, small wood’ (see Holt ).
North German (also Hölter): habitational name for someone from any of several places in Westphalia called Hölt and Holt (see Holt ). Compare Hoelter .

variants.name: Holtman
meanings: Dutch: variant of Holt + man ‘man’.
Americanized form of German   Holtmann  .

variants.name: Holtmann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Udo, Aloys, Hans, Heinz.
North German: variant of   Holt  .

variants.name: Holte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Bjorg, Erik, Helmer, Hjalmer, Knute, Nels, Nordahl, Selmer, Swen, Thorvald.
North German: variant of   Holt  .
North German: habitational name from any of several places so named.

variants.name: Hoult
meanings: English: variant of   Holt  .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Katherine .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Katherine Holt was born in 1354, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, her father, John Holt, was 30 and her mother, Alianore Durvassal, was 29. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Sir Guy de la Spine. She died on 30 June 1438, in her hometown, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Katherine Holt est née en 1354, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, John Holt, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alianore Durvassal, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Sir Guy de la Spine. Elle est décédée le 30 juin 1438, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Katherine Holt 1354 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Holt 30 und ihre Mutter Alianore Durvassal 29. Sie hatte mit Sir Guy de la Spine mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Juni 1438 im Alter von 84 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Katherine Holt è nata il nel 1354 nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, John Holt, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Alianore Durvassal, aveva 29 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Sir Guy de la Spine. Morì il 30 giugno 1438, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Holtが1354年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで生まれた時，父John Holtは30歳，母Alianore Durvassalは29歳であった。彼女はSir Guy de la Spineとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1438年6月30日に故郷で84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Holt(이)가 1354년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Holt(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alianore Durvassal(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Sir Guy de la Spine(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1438년 6월 30일 그녀의 고향에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Katherine Holt nasceu em 1354, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Holt, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alianore Durvassal, tinha 29 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Sir Guy de la Spine. Ela faleceu em 30 de junho de 1438, em sua cidade natal, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Katherine Holt родилась в 1354 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Holt было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alianore Durvassal, 29. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Sir Guy de la Spine. Она умерла 30 июня 1438 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Katherine Holt nació en 1354, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Holt, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Alianore Durvassal, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Sir Guy de la Spine. Murió el 30 de junio de 1438, en su pueblo, a la edad de 84 años.
